title: Goggles
description: Goggles re-adds Super Secret Settings that were removed in 1.9 and are reborn in individual tracks, similar to music discs.
body:
## I've archived this project becuase there are major changes I'd like to make now that I've gotten better at programming and know more about how OpenGL and Minecraft's rendering works. I don't recommed you use this at the moment, just know there will be bugs and issues. 

Goggles was designed to re-add super secret settings in a fun way, simaler to music discs. Goggles includes 25 different shaders to craft and find throughout the world. Currently, there is only support for NeoForge but it will come to Fabric, Forge, and Quilt at a later point.

FAQ:

Q:
Will you port to Fabric/Forge/Quilt?
A:
Yes, like I stated prevously. 

Q:
Will you port/backport to version X or Y?
A:
I may decide to port to major releases (1.18.2, 1.16.5, 1.12.2) but it is not currently planned.

If you have any issues please report them at the github repo.
